metadata.description: hironow's personal Claude Code plugins for autonomous research and expedition workflows

plugins.name: autoresearch
plugins.description: Autonomous experiment loop plugin inspired by karpathy/autoresearch. Iteratively modifies target code, evaluates against fixed metrics, and keeps only improvements via git-based keep/revert cycles.

plugins.name: paintress
plugins.description: Autonomous TDD expedition agent with Gradient Gauge momentum, Lumina learning, and Review Gate. Picks Linear issues, implements fixes via TDD, and creates PRs.
